How your lessons flow

Calm, structured steps from first move-off to mock test.

We meet you where you are, set a pace that feels kind, and give you two clear focuses after every drive. Manual or automatic, evenings and weekends across Suffolk.

Dual-control cars Local test routes Gentle feedback
Plan my lessons Ask a question

Your lesson path

Three clear stages, always at a pace that feels good to you.

1

Control & comfort

Easy starts and stops.

Calm mirror routines, simple parking markers, smooth clutch and steering practice.

2

Traffic-ready

Busy roads, kept gentle.

Roundabouts and meeting traffic without pressure; anticipation and timing that feel natural.

3

Advanced & mock tests

Calm mock tests.

Night, rain, and dual carriageway practice; DVSA-style mock tests delivered kindly.

Helpful touches

Little things that make learning feel calm and clear.

Gentle feedback

Optional video debriefs and two clear focuses after every drive.

  • Short micro-drills on manoeuvres and hill starts
  • Calm cues and breathing tips for busy traffic
  • Flexible pick-ups: home, office, campus

Choose what suits you

Transmission and post-test support, all kept calm.

Manual or automatic

Pick what feels right. We pair you with the right instructor and vehicle.

  • Modern dual-control cars
  • Parking sensors for safe practice
  • Routes built around your local test centre

Pass Plus & refreshers

Keep growing after your pass with calm, real-world coaching.

  • Motorway, night, and weather refreshers
  • Insurance-friendly advanced skills
  • One-off or short bundles available

Compare lesson packages

Simple, flexible options. No hidden extras.

Package Hours Includes Best for
Starter 5 Confidence chat, gentle basics, optional auto/manual switch New learners, refreshers
Core 20 Structured stages, mock test, night or rain drive Steady weekly progress
Intensive 30 Condensed schedule, 2 mock tests, dual carriageway focus Fast-track with calm pacing

Common questions

Quick answers before you book.

Where do you teach?

Across Suffolk and nearby test centres: Ipswich, Bury St Edmunds, Colchester.

Manual or automatic?

Both. Tell us your preference and we’ll match the right instructor and car.

How soon can I start?

Most learners start within a week; evenings and weekends available.

I’m nervous—can you go slower?

Yes. We repeat steps until you’re comfortable, with kind debriefs every drive.

Tell us how you like to learn

We’ll build a lesson plan around your pace, your goals, and your schedule.

Book a lesson Talk to us
